result.stdout:
THNETII.Utils.DotnetPlatformInfo:
  .NET Platform Information Command-line Utility

Usage:
  THNETII.Utils.DotnetPlatformInfo [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  os           Shows the Runtime Operating System
  osversion    Shows the Runtime Operating System version
  arch         Shows the Runtime Process Architecture
  rid          Shows the Runtime Identifier

Usage:

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  os           Shows the Runtime Operating System
  osversion    Shows the Runtime Operating System version
  arch         Shows the Runtime Process Architecture
  rid          Shows the Runtime Identifier

result.stdout:
os:
  Shows the Runtime Operating System

Usage:
  THNETII.Utils.DotnetPlatformInfo os [options]

Options:
  -p, --platform           Output Platform enumeration value
  -f, --format <FORMAT>    Platform enumeration format. Only valid with
                           --platform
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
